calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Steven Jackson and mother Jennifer Lau of minor present in court.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Simone Corazon Jackson-Lau to new name Paloma Simone Jackson-Lau.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Emanuel Sequoia Jackson-Lau to new name Sequoia Gabriel Jackson-Lau.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Off Calendar
